message:
feat(membrane): add 9 new runtime_math controllers and refine existing modules

Add nine new advanced mathematical controllers to the membrane's
runtime_math kernel, expanding the safety monitoring surface:

New modules:
- malliavin_sensitivity: Discrete Malliavin calculus controller that
  detects decision-boundary fragility by measuring how small input
  perturbations propagate through the validation pipeline
- info_geometry: Fisher-Rao geodesic distance monitor that detects
  structural regime shifts on the statistical manifold of runtime state
- matrix_concentration: Matrix Bernstein inequality (Tropp 2012) bounds
  for finite-sample spectral change detection in covariance matrices
- nerve_complex: Čech nerve theorem coherence monitor tracking Betti
  numbers (β₀/β₁) to detect fragmentation in multi-signal correlation
  topology
- wasserstein_drift: 1-Wasserstein (Earth Mover's Distance) on severity
  histograms for metric-aware distributional shift detection
- kernel_mmd: Maximum Mean Discrepancy (Gretton et al. 2012) with RBF
  kernel for distribution-free two-sample hypothesis testing
- lyapunov_stability: Lyapunov exponent estimation for detecting
  divergent/chaotic dynamics in controller state trajectories
- pac_bayes: PAC-Bayesian generalization bounds for monitoring whether
  learned validation policies remain within theoretical guarantees
- stein_discrepancy: Kernelized Stein discrepancy for goodness-of-fit
  testing against reference distributions without density estimation

Modified modules:
- eprocess: Add snapshot field documentation for new controller signals
- equivariant: Refine equivariance check tolerance and add new symmetry
  group test cases
- fusion: Fix minor fusion weight normalization edge case
- pareto: Add snapshot telemetry for Pareto front stability tracking
- mod.rs: Wire all 9 new controllers into RuntimeMathKernel dispatch,
  snapshot, and decide/observe integration points

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -188,6 +188,14 @@ fn all_families() -> [ApiFamily; ApiFamily::COUNT] {
         ApiFamily::MathFenv,
         ApiFamily::Loader,
         ApiFamily::Stdlib,
+        ApiFamily::Ctype,
+        ApiFamily::Time,
+        ApiFamily::Signal,
+        ApiFamily::IoFd,
+        ApiFamily::Socket,
+        ApiFamily::Locale,
+        ApiFamily::Termios,
+        ApiFamily::Inet,
     ]
 }

@@ -140,10 +140,18 @@ fn orbit_of_family(family: ApiFamily) -> usize {
         ApiFamily::PointerValidation
         | ApiFamily::Allocator
         | ApiFamily::StringMemory
-        | ApiFamily::Stdlib => 0, // memory/value-transform orbit
-        ApiFamily::Threading | ApiFamily::Loader => 1, // control/ordering orbit
-        ApiFamily::Stdio | ApiFamily::Resolver => 2,   // io/network orbit
-        ApiFamily::MathFenv => 3,                      // numeric orbit
+        | ApiFamily::Stdlib
+        | ApiFamily::Ctype => 0, // memory/value-transform orbit
+        ApiFamily::Threading | ApiFamily::Loader | ApiFamily::Signal => 1, // control/ordering orbit
+        ApiFamily::Stdio
+        | ApiFamily::Resolver
+        | ApiFamily::IoFd
+        | ApiFamily::Socket
+        | ApiFamily::Inet => {
+            2 // io/network orbit
+        }
+        ApiFamily::MathFenv | ApiFamily::Time => 3, // numeric orbit
+        ApiFamily::Locale | ApiFamily::Termios => 2, // io/locale orbit
     }
 }

     200_000, // Stdlib

 ];

 ];
 
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
